name: should create a query with fantasy points from careerlogs
description: Test case for should create a query with fantasy points from careerlogs
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."points" AS "points_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_3" AS "top_3_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_6" AS "top_6_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_12" AS "top_12_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_24" AS "top_24_from_careerlogs_0", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_36" AS "top_36_from_careerlogs_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "scoring_format_player_careerlogs" as "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d" on "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."points", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."points_per_game", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_3", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_6", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_12", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_24", "tc7d9f44547f502d36c6b00d12e8c055d"."top_36", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
